prompt: A [sauce or liquid food] pulled — two surfaces separating with [sauce or liquid food] stretched between them, [lens] at the exact point of maximum extension before the thread breaks, the [sauce or liquid food] catching [light source] along its entire length revealing its viscosity and [color detail], [surface A] and [surface B] both visible at frame edges, the air between them containing the [sauce or liquid food] in its most unstable state, editorial food physics still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
